The flat also includes a living-cum-dining area, a store room, a modular kitchen with a piped gas connection, and an attached utility area for added functionality. Residents can enjoy a clubhouse, gymnasium, park, and indoor games room, along with unique features like a meditation area, multipurpose courts, and a cyclingjogging track. Additional conveniences include a banquet hall, conference room, guest accommodation, and event space with an amphitheater. Families will appreciate the kids play area, flower gardens, and indoor squash and badminton courts, while maintenance staff and waste disposal systems ensure hassle-free living.LocalityThe propertys location is unbeatable, situated on the main S G Highway at Vaishnodevi Circle, providing seamless connectivity and accessibility. Reputed schools and hospitals are located within 1 km, while malls, supermarkets, banksATMs, and public transport options are just a short walk away. The Thaltej metro station is 5-7 km away, making travel across Ahmedabad quick and convenient.
